description_long: This object is a discarded aluminum beverage can, cylindrical in shape with a slightly indented top and bottom. The can is predominantly red with white branding and text, featuring the iconic Coca-Cola logo in flowing script across one side. The surface is smooth and metallic, with a glossy finish that reflects light. A standard pull tab is present on the top, designed for easy opening. The can also displays a vertical black-and-white barcode and nutritional information on the back. There are no visible dents, rust, or damage marks, and the can appears intact and empty.
description: A red, glossy Coca-Cola aluminum can with white branding, a pull tab on top, and a barcode on the back. The can is smooth, undamaged, and cylindrical.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the can with the large, vertically oriented 'Coke' text and part of the barcode visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the back of the can, displaying the barcode, nutritional information, and part of the Coca-Cola logo upside down.
description_view_2: This view features the classic Coca-Cola script logo prominently across the can's side, with the red and white color scheme clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view shows a close-up of the can's side with the white wave design and partial 'Coke' text, with less branding detail visible.
attribute_brand_logo: White Coca-Cola script logo in flowing cursive on a red background, with a white wave design.
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the back label.
